usdincurred.definition: The aggregation of all financials on a claim i.e. (Indemnity + Expenses + Reserves - Recoveries) in USD

usdexpensereserve.definition: The total reserve for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in USD

staticclaimbanding.definition: Banding based on age of Claim for statis claims

source.definition: Data Source: Eg. Genius, Lloyds etc.

recoveryflag.definition: Whether any possible recovery flagged for the claim

policysource.definition: System where the policy is extracted

policyregiondrilldown.definition: Regions ( Asia Pacific aria, Continental Europe, Japan Aria, uKI, GRM)

lastactivitydate.definition: Last date activity performed on the claim

fasttrackflag.definition: If it is a fast track claim

waitingperiod.definition: Business interruption deductible, usually described by a number of days (i.e. 30, 45, 60 etc.)

ucrsubscribe.definition: Unique claim reference number for energy

ucrenergy.definition: Unique claim reference number for energy

signedline.definition: The portion of total risk an underwriter agrees to cover

reservedepartment.definition: Detail reserve department for the loss

reserveclass.definition: Reserve class of line of business for loss

policyclaimindicator.definition: Policy with claim or without any claim

physicaldamagesgrosscostsusd.definition: Cost of physical damage in USD

physicaldamagesgrosscostsoriginal.definition: Cost of physical damage in original currency

occupancydetails.definition: More detail on type of occupancy

occupancy.definition: Type of energy sector like refinery or wind turbine or plant etc

movementbanding.definition: Claim movement banding based on claim amount movement

movementdaterange.definition: Movement start and end date range

movementusd.definition: Net change in total incurred within the specified “Date Range” selection criteria

maximumindemnityperiod.definition: Business interruption limit, usually described as a period of time (i.e. 12, 24 or 36 months)

matchedunmatchedstatus.definition: This staus columns shows if energy excel sheet UCR is available in subscribe or not

lifecyclebandings.definition: Banding based on claim lifecycle days

latestmovementdate.definition: Latest trabsaction date for the record

incurredtousd.definition: Total incurred up until the last day in the “Date Range” selection criteria

incurredfromusd.definition: Total incurred up until the first day in the “Date Range” selection criteria

financialbandings.definition: Financial banding based on total claim amount

failuremechanism.definition: What was the basic cause of the failure

expertname.definition: Name of the appointed Loss Adjusting firm

expertindividualname.definition: Name of the individual Loss Adjusting Expert

expensefeereserveusd.definition: Expense and fees reserve in USD

expensefeereserve100.definition: Total expense and fees reserve amount

expensefeepaidusd.definition: Expense and fees paid in USD

expensefeepaid100.definition: Total expense and fees paid amount

domicile.definition: USA or Rest of the World

declineflag.definition: If claim is declined or not

claimslifecycleindays.definition: Number of days in claim lifecycle

businessinterruptiongrosscostsusd.definition: Cost of business interruption in USD

businessinterruptiongrosscostsoriginal.definition: Cost of business interruption in original currency

blockind.definition: Block indicator as Yes or No

accountingyear.definition: Accounting year is dervied from UWYEAR

typeofincident.definition: Type of claim as type of incident

liabilitycode.definition: Liability code or secondary claim status

incidentdate.definition: Date of loss as incident date

eventcatcode.definition: Event/claim group code (applicable for claim groups)

denialcategory.definition: If claim declined then category of denial

dateincidentopened.definition: Date when the claim incident opened

dateincidentnotifiedtoclaimshandlers.canonical: Date Incident Notified to Claims Handlers
dateincidentnotifiedtoclaimshandlers.definition: Date loss reported to claim handler

dateincidentclosed.definition: Date when the claim incident closed

gdprriskofclaim.definition: GDPR risk as High, Low or No risk

gdprrisk.definition: GDPR risk as High, Low or No risk

explicitconsentindicator.definition: If explicit consent provided or not

cspexplicitconsentflag.definition: CSP explicit consent flag as All oTher or not yet determined

claimrankings.definition:
claims ranking depend on the explicit consent indicator 
if the consent is provided or not requiered it will be valued at 1 
if the consent is not yet determined it will be valued at 2 
and if the consent is withheld or withdrwan it will be valued at 3

claimowner.definition: Claim owner or claim handler name

claimofficehandled.definition: Which claim office handled the claim

vendorreferral.definition: Indicator to show if referred by vendor

savingscurrency.definition: Original currency in which saving was registered

savingsbandingusd.definition: Saving banding based on saving amount

refertopolice.definition: Indicator to show if referred to police

refertofinancialcrime.definition: Fraud internal referral indicator for SIU (Financial Crime)

reasonforreferral.definition: Reason for flagging as a Fraud Threat

primaryreferralsource.definition: Category or Type of Primary Fraud threat Referral Source: Adjuster or third party etc

pendingindicator.definition: To indicate that Suspected Claim is not closed

manualreferral.definition: Indicator to show if referred manually

kireferral.definition: Indicator to show if referred by third party Kennedys International

fraudbureaureferral.definition: Indicator to show if referred by Fraud Bureau

estimatedsavingusd.definition: Estimated saving from fraud in USD

detectreferral.definition: Indicator to show if referral is detected

closedwithimpact.definition: Indicator to show Fraud claim records which are are closed and have a Savings assigned.

closednoimpact.definition: Indicator to show Fraud claim records which are are closed and have no financial impact

closedindicator.definition: To indicate that Suspected Claim is closed

causeoflossdescription.definition: Cause of loss selected from given options

carpereferral.definition: Indicator to show if referred by third party Carpe

acceptedforinvestigation.definition: If the claim accepted for fraud investigation

unregisterflag.definition: Unregister flag as Yes or No

timetorespondworkdays.definition: Workdays to respond to the claim

timetoeffectpayment.definition: Days it took to complete payment from received date i.e. time to get payment processed

timetoacknowledge.definition: Days it took to acknowledge claim from reported date

sublob.definition: Sub LOB name under selected executive LOB

statusdescription.definition: Status description of the claim (FME Complete or not)

marfasttrackflag.definition: Refer if a claim is Fast Track claim or not

igniteproductname.definition: Product name as per Ignite system

gpipaymentid.definition: GPI Payment ID is the Id of the epayment in the GPI System

duplicates.definition: Indicator for duplicate claims (value 1 for duplicate claim else 0)

documentid.definition: Unique ID given to each uploaded document

daccode.definition: Direct Assume CededCode - AR(1) Identifies a particular transaction as resulting from direct, assumed, ceded or retro ceded business

covidrelatedclaim.definition: Claim related to Covid or not

claimtimetoacknowledged.definition: Time taken to acknowledge the claim

claimsystem.definition: Claim system as Claims Connect, Workview or CGM

actiondate.definition: Date any action taken on the claim

usdoslrtotal.definition: The total reserve for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period in USD

usdindemnity.definition: The total claim amount for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in USD

usdexpensetotal.definition: The total expense amount for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in USD

reservecompletionbusinessdays.definition: Reserve Completion - Business Days refers to the amount of time it takes for an insurance company to complete the processing and settlement of a claim, specifically in relation to setting the reserve amount. The reserve amount is the estimated value of the claim and is used by the insurance company to manage their financial obligations.

registrationcompletionbandingsox.definition: Number of days between claim submition by client and registration in our systems

registrationcompletionbanding5days.definition: Days banding for registartion completed banding - if it is within 5 days

registrationcompletionbanding10days.definition: Days banding for registartion completed banding - if it is within 10 days

recoveryreferralflag.definition: If there is any recovery referral flag available or not

recoveryindicator.definition: Recovery made for the claim or not

oslrusd.definition: The total reserve for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period in USD

oslrledger.definition: The total reserve for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period

nominalsectionreserve.definition: This is based on reserve amount that adjuster adds in genius, generally if its 99 then its a huge reserve if its 123 then less.

nominalreserve.definition: The sum of reserves on any claim with cumulative gross (DACs 1&2), Original Currency reserve fitting logic outlined: Reserves = 77, 88, 99 or 123. Built into Broadview for 77 and 123. 88 and 99 is calculated in Qlik Sense

multinationalindicator.definition: If the policy is Multinational policy

multinationalbanding.definition: Define if policy is multinational or not

mnfnnumber.definition: Multination MN/FN number of the policy

ledgeroslrtotal.definition: The total reserve for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in original currency

ledgerindemnitytotal.definition: The total claim amount for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in original currency

ledgerincurredtotal.definition: The aggregation of all financials on a claim i.e. (Indemnity + Expenses + Reserves - Recoveries) - in original currency

ledgerexpensetotal.definition: The total expense amount for every claim that is open, reopened or closed in the maximum selected accounting period - in original currency

ledgercurrencycode.definition: Original curreny code (with respect to loss country)

industrycode.definition: The industry code specifies the type of insurance that the policy covers

inlitigation.definition: Any litigation for the claim - Yes/No

germaniccluster.definition: If policy belongs to Germanic cluster (Austria, Germany and Switzerland)

geniuslevelindicator.definition: Indicate if the claim is Fast Track or Level 1/2/3 or other

companysignalreserveflag.definition: Signal reserve - MEA initiated a Signal Reserving process in 2023 where the following reserves are raised in Genius or Docosoft reflecting different potential exposures to Chubb – 1900, 2700, 3700 & 4700. This field will show company signal reserve

claimtypecode.definition: Identifies the type of policy coverage applicable to the loss.

claimlifedays.definition: Total number of days open (Reported Date to Closed Date) for closed Claims/Claimants / Count of Closed Claims/Claimants or 2. Total number of days open (Reported Date to Current Date) for pending Claims/Claimants / Count of pending Claims/Claimants

claimlifebanding.definition: Banding based on age of Claim

claimeventdescription.definition: Details of claim event eneterd by user

cgmsignalreserveflag.definition: For signal reserve as defined, it will show CGM signal reserve value

causeoflosscode.definition: Associated with cause of loss description

catastrophecode.definition: Code given to group of claims raised for same catastophic incident

actionneeded.definition: Claims with a nominal reserve pending for review

yearcrd.definition: Calendar Object to define Year based on Claim Reported Date

region.definition: Region as UKISA or CE or MENA

quartercrd.definition: Calendar Object to define Quarter based on Claim Reported Date

nil123flag.definition: Indicator to flag claims with Nil or 123 Nominal Reserves

monthcrd.definition: Calendar Object to define Month based on Claim Reported Date

grossrecoverybanding.definition: Gross Recovery bandings allows to view the data split into groups/ranges of Gross Recoveriey Amount

grosspaidsbandingusd.definition: Gross Paids bandings allows to view the data split into groups/ranges of Gross Paid Amount USD

grossincurredexclexpenseusdbanding.canonical: Gross Incurred Excl Expense USD Banding
grossincurredexclexpenseusdbanding.definition: Gross Incurred Excl Expense USD bandings allows to view the data split into groups/ranges of Gross Incurred Excl Expense USD

exclude.definition: An indicator used to flag records which should be excluded for specific reporting

estrecoverybandingusd.definition: Banding based on estimated recovery in USD

clusterold.definition: Filter capability for Older Cluster definitions

cirrecoverystatuscode.definition: Claim Recovery Status Code as ingested from PCW source data

yearofaccount.definition: The Lloyd's year of account associated with the policy.

week.definition: Week for Lloyd's and Lirma file

transactionstatus.definition: The transaction status associated with this transaction on the processing date

slainout.definition: Over/Under 4 Days for Lloyd's and LIRMA

sequencenumber.definition: The claim sequence number of the transaction within the claim

responsetype.definition: This shows if the response was a Manual response or an Automatic response

reinsured.definition: The Reinsured Name associated with the transaction

processingdate.definition: The processing date to which the file relates

participantrole.definition: Partivipant role as Agreement Party or Lead

paperecf.definition: Indicates whether this transaction has been processed as an ECF transaction or Paper Transaction

leadmaname.definition: The name of the managing agent associated with the bureau lead syndicate code.

furtheragreementpartyname.definition: The managing agent name associated with the further agreement party syndicate code on the claim transaction.

furtheragreementpartycode.definition: The syndicate number of the further agreement party on the transaction concerned.

delegatedleadname.definition: The name of the organisation to whom the Leader has delegated their lead role, if applicable.

datetransactionlastupdated.definition: The date this transaction was last updated by the broker

datetransactioncreated.definition: The date this transaction was first created by the broker

datetransactioncompleted.definition: The date this transaction was set to Transaction status of Complete (set to transaction status ’40’)

datetransactioncancelled.definition: The date this transaction was cancelled (set to transaction status ‘45’)

daterejected.definition: The date that this transaction was rejected by the lead

dateofchubbresponse.definition: The date that that Chubb responded to this market line on this transaction

datecirculated.definition: The date the transaction was circulated by the lead

criticalpathindicator.definition: Shows whether the responsible party was on the critical path at this stage: Y = This response is on the critical path, N = This response is not on the critical path.

createddate.definition: The day upon which the Broker created the transaction on ECF/CLASS – i.e. the date when the transaction was first added to the Market Repository /CLASS.

classofbusinesscode.definition: The Class of Business Code entered by the Lirma Lead when circulating the transaction

classofbusiness60.definition: The Lloyd's Class of Business (60) that the risk code associated with the claim falls into.

classofbusiness10.definition: The Lloyd's Class of Business (10) that the risk code associated with the claim falls into.

claimscheme.definition: The Claim Scheme relating the claim - this could be '2006 and Prior' or '2010'. Paper claims will be set to '---'

claimlinenumber.definition: The position of the carrier within the market lines

cgmglasgowcheck.definition: Checked by CGM Glasgow office or not

categorycode.definition: The Category Code entered by the Lirma Lead when circulating the transaction

carrierresponsecode.definition: The latest response made by the Chubb carrier (the response made on ‘Date of Chubb Response’

carriername.definition: The name of the Chubb company on the market of the claim transaction

businessunit.definition: The MA business unit mapping as defined by the MA.

bureauleaderorganizationname.definition: The carrier organisation associated with the Lirma lead carrier code

bureauleadercode.definition: The Lirma Bureau Lead Carrier Code

bureauleader.definition: The Lirma Bureau Lead associated with the Lirma lead carrier code

brokercontactname.definition: The organisation name associated with the broker code

brokercontactemail.definition: Email address associated with the broker code

brokercode.definition: The broker code associated with the transaction

activitydate.definition: The date associated with the Responsible Party Code activity identified in Activity Code.

activitycode.definition: The activity code corresponding to the response that has been made on the transaction.

100amountsettledthistransactioningbp.canonical: 100% Amount Settled this Transaction in GBP
100amountsettledthistransactioningbp.definition: 100% Amount Settled this Transaction in GBP

100amountpaidtodateingbp.canonical: 100% Amount Paid to Date in GBP
100amountpaidtodateingbp.definition: 100% Amount Paid to Date in GBP

workitemattachment.definition: Workitem attached or handled by ClaimConnect

sourcesystem.definition: Source system as ClaimsConnect or WorkView

echomigration.definition: Normal claim or migrated from Echo system

category.definition: Category as Unregistered, Unreserved or Recovery

agebracket.definition: Age bracket based on claim age

vendor.definition: Vendor Selected to extract the data
